xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ABriefOnTypesOfCustomersExplan: The Company has a strong foothold and premium brand customers in UK & USA for our fine quality garments and dedicated customer service.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsForGrievanceRedressalMe: The Shareholders are the only investors of the Company.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: For our operations, major source of energy we consuming from renewable energy that minimizes carbon pollution by way of electrical energy from wind mills and solar energy, which is a non conventional energy source.

The Company follows Chemical free 2200 KLD of 100% Biological Oxidation process with ultra filtration and reserve osmosis separation process and multiple effect evaporator followed by agitator thin film drier for final reject management system.

The Company places very high importance on safety of its employees. By continuously focusing on behavioral, process, contractors, and transport safety. The Company is aiming for smooth operations. The basic objective is to make the working place safe for all its employees.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: Health and Safety are deeply embedded in the operations and using digitalization and automation to enhance safety governance at all the levels. Enabled systematic approach for monitoring all the third- party service providers of the company on stringent safety criteria.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:SpecificCommitmentsGoalsAndTar: Though not set any such specific commitment goals, we continue to adhere all the guiding principles.
Though not set any such specific commitment goals, we continue to adhere all the guiding principles.
Though not set any such specific commitment goals, we continue to adhere all the guiding principles.

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:StatementByDirectorResponsible: In an era where Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) are shaping the future of the enterprise, SPAL has ESG principles into its core business strategy. SPAL understands the importance of giving back to the communities it serves. SPAL is actively contributing to the education, healthcare, and skill development through its social impact programs, and it adheres to the standards of corporate governance, transparency, accountability, and ethical conduct through the core of its operations.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheHighestAuthorityRe: Mr.P.Sundararajan DIN: 00003380 Designation: Chairman and Managing Director Telephone: 04296714000 email: csoffice@spapparels.com
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfSpecifiedCommitteeOfT: Risk Management Committee. The Committee comprises of: - Mr.P.Sundararajan, Chairman & Managing Director - Mr.C.R.Rajagopal, Independent Director - Mr.Chenduran, Joint Managing Director. The Committee monitors and approves risk management and sustainability framework on a regular basis among others
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:TopicsOrPrinciplesCoveredUnder: 1. Compliance with the applicable legislation, regulations and significant material development. 2. Increasing the effectiveness of Human resources. 3. Revewing the Risk Management framework. 4. Ensruing the efficacy of Internal financial controls. 5. Reviweing and planning the sustainability initiatives.

1. Compliance with the applicable legislation, regulations and significant material development. 2. Increasing the effectiveness of Human resources. 3. Revewing the Risk Management framework. 4. Ensruing the efficacy of Internal financial controls. 5. Reviweing and planning the sustainability initiatives.
1. Fire and work Safety management. 2. Awareness programmes on sustainability. 3. Sports 4. Knowledge Sharing. 5. Workplace stress management.
1. Fire and work Safety management. 2. Awareness programmes on stress management 3. Knowledge sharing
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AntiCorruptionOrAntiBriberyPol: Our Company have zero tolerance to bribery and corruption in any form by any party and we follow high standard of ethical conduct of not accepting or offering bribes, or participate in corrupt practices. The policy is available on the Company’s website at – https://www.s-p-apparels.com/wp/wp-content/uploads/bsk-pdfmanager/2023/08/Anti-Bribery-Policy.pdf
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfImprovementsInEnviron: Water treatment, solar rooftop panels, briquettes to reduce CO2 emission.
Water treatment, solar rooftop panels, briquettes to reduce CO2 emission.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesInPlaceToS: 100% of plastics waste including packing material are sold for recycling.
E-waste are sold only to authorized vendors of TamilNadu Pollution Control Board
Hazardous waste are sold to TNPCB authorized hazardous waste vendors.
All the cutting wastes are segregated colour wise and sold for other reusage.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMechanismAvailableToR: Employees can approach Grievance Redressal Investigation Committee (GRIC) to resolve their discrepancies on immediate basis, employees can also register their grievances in a toll free number given for redressal purpose.

Employees can approach Grievance Redressal Investigation Committee (GRIC) to resolve their discrepancies on immediate basis, employees can also register their grievances in a toll free number given for redressal purpose.

Employees can approach Grievance Redressal Investigation Committee (GRIC) to resolve their discrepancies on immediate basis, employees can also register their grievances in a toll free number given for redressal purpose.

Employees can approach Grievance Redressal Investigation Committee (GRIC) to resolve their discrepancies on immediate basis, employees can also register their grievances in a toll free number given for redressal purpose.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOccupationalHealthAnd: The Company’s Units have implemented occupational health and safety management systems covering all elements of Plan-Do-Check-Act (PDCA) cycle.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DesclosureOfTheProcessesUsedTo: • Identifying Hazards: After assessing the workplace routinely, potential hazard will be identified. • Risk Assessment: Once the thread is identified then it would be assessed to measure the intensity of the risk. • Control Measures: Based on the assessment we implement the steps to control and manage the risk. • Documentation and Review: The threads identified and control measures taken were documented accordingly and the same will be subject to periodical review.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMeasuresTakenByTheE: Health of the Employees and workers are paramount for the wellbeing of the Company. The Company is following various effective initiations with regard to the safe and healthy workplace. All the safety measures to be followed at the time to emergency were directly demonstrated to the employees and workers along with their effective participation. A dedicated medical team and evacuation team is always ready to be deployed. SPAL always prioritize the organizational safety culture at any cost. Numerous initiatives have been undertaken to improve employee safety at the Units.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionTa: No significant Risky incidents were occurred.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMeasuresUndertakenByT: Yes, we ensure that statutory dues have been deducted and deposited by the value chain partners.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionTa: We are monitoring the sustainable practices followed by our value chain partners.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesForIdentif: The Company has internal framework to capture the internal and external stakeholders to have an insight of their needs and expectations. And devised suitable plan to cater their needs.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ProvideTheProcessesForConsulta: The Consultation with the stakeholders and the Board on economic, environmental, and social topics has been delegated to the respective departments who are in close contact with the identified stakeholders on continuous basis. The Board and relevant Committees are briefed about the interactions with the stakeholders and action implemented.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfInstancesAsToHowTheIn: Stakeholders form an integral part of the Company’s business. Consultations are in the form of Meetings and other mode of digital communications. Based on the Consultation with the stakeholders the Company will frame the mechanism to effectively address the grievances. The Company focuses meeting with customers to improve the quality of its products and to cater the needs of the market. It follows a bottom-up approach for all social projects. All projects are planned in consultation with the community. The process involves interacting with them and understanding their challenges and issues.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfInstancesOfEngagement: The CSR projects of the Company aim to focus on a social transformation in the life of its disadvantaged, vulnerable and marginalised stakeholders. The Company ensures that the CSR funds are utilised in an optimum manner that uplifts the weaker sections of the society. The Company works towards overall development of the way of life of the communities around its Units, most of which are in distant rural areas. For more information, please refer the Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) Section of this Annual Report.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: 1. Personal and Group Meetings 2. Skill development 3. Training 4. Internal Communications
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: To improve productivity and standard of Work and for refreshments from work stress.
To discuss about the management of Supply chain issues and quality of the product.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: 1. Regulatory Filings 2. Facility Inspections 3. One on One meetings
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: To discuss about the issues faced by the Customers and to redress it immediately
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: 1. Meetings 2. Website 3. Investor Presentation 4. Annual Report One on One meeting
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: Discussion about the performance of the Company, declare dividend and getting approvals.
Empowering the Vulnerable People by providing Food and education and actively contributing towards the wellbeing of the Community.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheInternalMechanismsI: 1. GRIC has been constituted by the Management. Senior officials at various levels are the members of this committee. 2. We have established a Grievance redressal Committee which periodically reviews the employees concerns 3. We have installed suggestion box in prominent work places which is taken care by concerned department and timely remedial measures is given 4. Toll free numbers are displayed everywhere in workplace, which enables the employees to reach out in case of need 5. We have also set up a Works committee
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MechanismsToPreventAdverseCons: • Shop Floor Committee meeting • General Grievance Redressal (GGR) • Critical Grievance Redressal (CGR) • Random Grievance Redressal (RGR)
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionsT: No any such adverse incidents took place.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfABusinessProcessBeing: Not applicable as no such modifications has been introduced in the current reporting year.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheScopeAndCoverageOf: The Company’s Human rights policy recognizes the following priority issues: 1. We are duly audited and certified by the concerned authorities. 2. We are zero tolerant to the child, forced or compulsory labour in operations and supply chains 3. We provide equal opportunity for all employees and also Providing opportunities for all employees to express concerns and seek redressal.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionsT: No such incidents took place for corrective actions.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DiscloseWhetherTargetsSetUnder: We are conducting Factories Environmental Module (FEM) every year in all factories and the results are also verified by certified third parties external agencies such as PGS Energy Services, NIN Energy India Pvt Ltd.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfCoverageAndImplementa: The Processing division of the Company where the effluent level is high are compliant with Zero Liquid Discharge. The Company follows Chemical free 2200 KLD of 100% Biological Oxidation process with ultra filtration and reserve osmosis separation process and multiple effect evaporator followed by agitator thin film drier for final reject management system. Overall 99.1 % water recovered and reused as process water
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfProjectRelatedToReduc: The Company is committed to reduce its carbon footprint and to achieve the target of carbon neutrality by 2050, the Company has taken major initiatives such as installation of solar roof top in the factories. It also adopted processes such as replacing traditional fuel with alternative fuel, improving energy efficiency and using industrial waste as raw material.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfWasteManagementPracti: The management of waste generated is being undertaken as detailed below: - The Company has a waste management system which segregates hazardous and non-hazardous waste, recycling, treatment and disposal. - Wet waste is stabilized by composting - Hazardous waste generated viz. lube oil, grease and oily cotton, is managed through authorized recyclers - The Company follows Zero Discharge of Hazardous Chemicals which enables to reduce the Hazardous Chemicals discharge in the water.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DisclosureWebLinkOfEntityAtWhi: The Company has a business continuity and robust disaster management plan thoroughly implemented at each Unit. Mock Drills are conducted frequently to educate employees and workers of the Company to act in vigilant manner at the time of emergency and they were trained to combat fire, to save and rescue people inside the factories. Further health and safety protocols and adequate communication protocols during extreme weather events ensure safety at sites and minimise the impact on workforce. Insurance coverage is in place to protect against damages to business assets or loss of materials in warehouses or transit due to extreme weather events.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkForDetailsOfInitiativeT: Recycling of treated process effluent from ETP through followed by Ultra Filtration (UF) & Reverse Osmosis.
Reduction of raw water consumption in canteen and gardening through process improvements.
Fabric, E-Waste, Packing material and plastic are sold for recycling.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:OutcomeOfTheInitiative: Reduction in Green House Gases and Conversion of Energy.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkForDetailsOfInitiativeT: The Company sourcing the electrical energy from non conventional energy sources which is windmills & roof top solar panels, contributes 82 % of its total power consumption.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsToReceive: As a part of the CSR Policy, the Company has a dedicated team to proactively meets the community representatives and marginal stakeholders. Required solutions were implemented as per the need.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsInPlaceTo: - The Company is a Customer Centric organisation designed to enrich customers’ experience. There’s an effective complaint handing procedure that facilitates prompt logging, investigation, resolution, and closure. - Customers can register complaints through dealers, Company team, Company Website, Contact Centre. Upon receipt of the customer complaint, the technical personnel attend and address the complaint within 24 hours. all the complaints are monitored on monthly basis.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionsT: No corrective actions during the year
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WeblinkWhereInformationOnProdu: The information on company’s products can be accessed through company’s website i.e., www.spapparels.com
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:StepsTakenToInformAndEducateCo: Our product tag contains the information on the safe and responsible usage of the products such as Wash care instructions, product features, Customer care details etc. We mention these instructions on all of our apparel products.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfProductInformationOnT: The Company only discloses the product information what is mandated under the Various Act.
